generated_oml:
prefix dt: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#

instance IncubatorEnvironment : dt:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system physical twin environment",
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply, InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : dt:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance Heatbed : dt:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element with dimensions 214x214x3 mm controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : dt:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with airflow rate of 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : dt:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hardware"
]

instance PCB : dt:Component [
    base:desc "Printed Circuit Board with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current handling"
]

instance PowerSupply : dt:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance InternalTempSensor1 : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire temperature sensor (accuracy ±0.5°C) for internal temperature monitoring",
    dt:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire temperature sensor (accuracy ±0.5°C) for internal temperature monitoring",
    dt:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : dt:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 high-precision 1-Wire temperature sensor (accuracy ±0.5°C) for external ambient temperature monitoring",
    dt:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : dt:DataTransmitted [
    dt:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : dt:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors",
    dt:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    dt:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelA : dt:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with two parameters: C_air (air heat capacity) and G_box (box thermal conductance)",
    dt:inputTo ScipyEnabler, INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftwareEnabler
]

instance ModelB : dt:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with four parameters: C_heater (heater heat capacity), C_air (air heat capacity), G_heater (heater thermal conductance), G_box (box thermal conductance)",
    dt:inputTo ScipyEnabler, INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftwareEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and virtual components",
    dt:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization of thermal model parameters",
    dt:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocolEnabler : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol implementation for communication with DS18S20 temperature sensors",
    dt:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance INTOCPSOpenSourceSoftwareEnabler : dt:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source software from INTO-CPS-Association repository for digital twin components",
    dt:enables ThermalSimulationService, StateEstimationService, ControlParameterOptimizationService, FaultDetectionService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance ThermalSimulationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction of thermal behavior using calibrated thermal models",
    dt:provides PredictedTemperatureInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature for safety and optimal operation",
    dt:provides TemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for temperature distribution across the incubator",
    dt:provides TemperatureDistributionInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of control parameters such as heating duration (H) and waiting duration (C)",
    dt:provides OptimizedHeatingDurationInsight, OptimizedWaitingDurationInsight, AdjustHeatingDurationAction, AdjustWaitingDurationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm for identifying anomalies in thermal system",
    dt:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for managing the thermal system operation",
    dt:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : dt:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal model parameters using Scipy optimization",
    dt:provides CalibratedParametersInsight
]

instance PredictedTemperatureInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature distribution based on thermal model simulations"
]

instance TemperatureMonitoringInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings for safety monitoring"
]

instance TemperatureDistributionInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated temperature distribution across the incubator environment"
]

instance OptimizedHeatingDurationInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal heating duration (H) for maintaining target temperature"
]

instance OptimizedWaitingDurationInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal waiting duration (C) for bang-bang control strategy"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies in the thermal system operation"
]

instance CalibratedParametersInsight : dt:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from Scipy optimization"
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : dt:Action [
    base:desc "High-level control actions for system supervision",
    dt:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHeatingDurationAction : dt:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heating duration parameter H in the bang-bang controller",
    dt:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustWaitingDurationAction : dt:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust waiting duration parameter C in the bang-bang controller",
    dt:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands generated by the controller (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical actuators. The driver ensures safe execution through protocol checks before actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation integrates the PT (heatbed, fan, sensors), RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and thermal models. Information flows from PT sensors to RabbitMQ, then to DT components for processing, with commands flowing back to PT actuators via RabbitMQ."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is integrated during the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, where it continuously monitors and simulates the physical system after deployment. Models developed during design are retained and updated with operational data to maintain relevance."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity was validated by comparing simulated temperature trajectories with experimental data. Assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature distribution) were tested via multi-sensor experiments, with residual error minimized through least-squares calibration. Uncertainty was addressed by parameter optimization to reduce prediction errors."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses RabbitMQ as a message broker for data exchange between PT components and DT. Sensor data is transmitted via 1-Wire bus to Raspberry Pi, with control commands routed through RabbitMQ queues between controller and low-level driver."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed on-premises on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, hosting the RabbitMQ server, controller software, low-level driver, and model execution environment. All components run locally on the Raspberry Pi without cloud dependency."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to ensure device safety during actuation. The controller uses upper/lower temperature limits (UL, LL) to prevent unsafe conditions, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
